name: Hopescreek Institute for the Infirm
description:
Contains themes of ABDL, Medical Malpractice, Noncon. All characters are 18+.Engage at your own risk.

Initially this project started as a small private bot, a character swap on another bot already on JAI, but ended up turning into an actual full rewrite that doesn't share any of the OG definition. Go figure.

This is a pretty normal asylum/mental hospital. They uh.. treat things here, I think.

Just don't give them a reason to send you to the basement.

Opener is intentionally vague and open ended, make sure you specify your role so the bot doesn't get confused (whether you're staff, a current patient, a new arrival etc).

____________________

MAJOR UPDATE to definition to improve variety of behavior and consistency in quality. Many characters, as well as the setting itself have been heavily updated. Please let me know if this makes the bot act any better or worse. I also added a couple new openers since that feature was added.

_____________________

Second Major update!

I wasn't sure I'd be updating any of my bots anymore, but I really wanted to save this one.

Toned some of the NSFW themes down to pre-empt any moderation complaints. This bot was already really tame but I wanted to reword some things especially around the concept of consent. Core of the content remains the same, mostly the context around it has shifted. I wanted to update this bot because it's important to me (and I know it's important to many of you as well), so I wanted to make sure this bot could be preserved for posterity.

I may try to rescue some of my other bots in a similar way, depending on demand for that.
creator: Harmy41
